Harvard Quantum LACT
  • About
  • People
  • Seminar (current)

Seminar

We host a weekly seminar on theoretical aspects of quantum science, bringing together researchers interested in quantum information, quantum computation, quantum complexity theory, and mathematical physics. If you would like to attend the seminar or give a talk, please feel free to contact one of our faculty members.
